# Vendored: @kbbridge/genexus-sdk (compiled)

This folder is a **compiled copy** of the public `@kbbridge/genexus-sdk` package
(MIT licensed). It is vendored so this extension builds without an external dependency.

- **Do not edit these files.** They are build output.
- To update, rebuild the SDK in the `kbbridge-editor-genexus-sdk` repository (`npm run build`)
  and copy its `out/` contents here, then re-run `scripts/bundle-dependencies.js`.
- Canonical source & bug reports: the `kbbridge-editor-genexus-sdk` repository.
